reference_answer: AB-17 authorizes access to CAB-14, CAB-16, and CAB-19.
Access Bulletin AB-17, signed by Facilities Director Mira Cho on 2026-03-04, authorizes Rowan Iqbal's access to CAB-16.
AB-17 grants observation-only access to CAB-19.
Older memo AB-16 applies only to CAB-11.
RD-22 clears PK-3 and PK-8 for external transfer.
Release Directive RD-22, issued by the Review Board on 2026-04-09, authorizes the release of PK-8.
HN-4 keeps PK-5 internal for additional review.
No. HN-4 is not transfer authority for PK-3 or PK-8.
